  One thing worth carrying into the later rewrites, since this was the exemplar: both defects were unexercised claims that read as true, and both survived my own verification pass because they were prose
  rather than commands. The claim ledger discipline caught every tool claim and missed the two assertions about tools. Worth making that an explicit check when Phase B copies this pattern.

✻ Baked for 1m 41s
                                                                                                                                                                    new task? /clear to save 342.9k tokens
